languages.text: {n}Янур поднимает на вас взгляд, отрываясь от резьбы, и хмыкает, вопросительно подняв бровь.{/n}
{n}Janur tears his attention away from his carving with a grunt and looks up at you expectantly, one eyebrow raised.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Янур поднимает на вас взгляд, отрываясь от резьбы, и хмыкает, вопросительно подняв бровь.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ジャヌールは、木と骨で作った小さな彫刻を、ため息をつきながら中断し、期待を込めてあなたを見上げる。眉は一つだけ上がっている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Janur breaks off from his humble wood and bone carving with a grunt, looking up at you expectantly, one eyebrow raised.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Janur, homurdanarak dikkatini oymadan ayırıp tek kaşını kaldırmış hâlde beklentiyle sana bakıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Janur tears his attention away from his carving with a grunt and looks up at you expectantly, one eyebrow raised.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur, homurdanarak dikkatini oymadan ayırıp tek kaşını kaldırmış hâlde beklentiyle sana bakıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}雅努尔轻哼一声，把注意力从木雕上挪开，抬头期待地看着你，一边眉毛微微扬起。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Janur tears his attention away from his carving with a grunt and looks up at you expectantly, one eyebrow raised.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}雅努尔轻哼一声，把注意力从木雕上挪开，抬头期待地看着你，一边眉毛微微扬起。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Janur wendet sich widerwillig von seinen Schnitzereien ab und sieht dich mit hochgezogener Braue erwartungsvoll an.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Janur tears his attention away from his carving with a grunt and looks up at you expectantly, one eyebrow raised.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur wendet sich widerwillig von seinen Schnitzereien ab und sieht dich mit hochgezogener Braue erwartungsvoll an.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Janur interrompt son travail de sculpture avec un grognement et lève vers vous un regard interrogateur en haussant un sourcil.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Janur desvía la atención de su obra con un gruñido y te mira con expectación, arqueando una ceja.{/n}
